zh.lifeSummary: 當Alveradis van Cuijk於1135年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特可時，她的父親Godfried I van Cuijk35歲，母親Ida von Arnsberg27歲。她於1172年之前與Otto I van Holland在荷蘭-拉藍德丹 哈格結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1205年在德國尼德薩辛格拉福沙福特 本海姆巴德 本海姆享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alveradis van Cuijk于1135年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特可时，她的父亲Godfried I van Cuijk35岁，母亲Ida von Arnsberg27岁。她于1172年之前与Otto I van Holland在荷兰-拉藍德丹 哈格结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1205年在德国尼德薩辛格拉福沙福特 本海姆巴德 本海姆享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Alveradis van Cuijk was born in 1135, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, her father, Godfried I van Cuijk, was 35 and her mother, Ida von Arnsberg, was 27. She married Otto I van Holland before 1172, in The Hague, South Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1205, in Bad Bentheim, Grafschaft Bentheim, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alveradis van Cuijk est née en 1135, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Godfried I van Cuijk, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ida von Arnsberg, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Otto I van Holland avant 1172, à La Haye, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1205, à Bad Bentheim, Grafschaft Bentheim, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alveradis van Cuijk 1135 in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfried I van Cuijk 35 und ihre Mutter Ida von Arnsberg 27. Sie hat vor 1172 in Den Haag, Südholland, Niederlande Otto I van Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1205 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Bad Bentheim, Grafschaft Bentheim, Niedersachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alveradis van Cuijk è nata il nel 1135 nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Godfried I van Cuijk, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Ida von Arnsberg, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Otto I van Holland prima del 1172, nel Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1205, nel Bad Bentheim, Grafschaft Bentheim, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alveradis van Cuijk(이)가 1135년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 c이j크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfried I van Cuijk(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida von Arnsberg(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1172년 이전 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 든 하아그에서 Otto I van Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1205년 독일 니더작센 그라프샤프트 벤테임 바드 벤테임에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alveradis van Cuijk родилась в 1135 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Godfried I van Cuijk было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida von Arnsberg, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto I van Holland перед 1172 г. в местности ден хааг, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1205 г. в местности бад бентим, графщафт бентим, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 70 лет.
